Part.Source:
Event Start
tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0
LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &tmpNfeItmCod = &partmpNfeItmCod padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#SALVARPROXIMPORTACOMPRA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') if substr(&padObs , 1, 1) = '1' &SalvarAvancar = true Else &SalvarAvancar = false Endif
RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfsistema.TCon148_ControleLote, &TCon148_ControleLote)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable5.Height = 50 UnnamedTable6.Height = 320 UnnamedTable30.Width = 120 UnnamedTable29.Width = 70 we.Width = 10 UnnamedTable28.Width = 120 UnnamedTable27.Width = 70 UnnamedTable26.Width = 120 UnnamedTable25.Width = 500 UnnamedTable33.Width = 200 UnnamedTable36.Width = 130 UnnamedTable45.Width = 115 UnnamedTable42.Width = 130 tbAtivarProduto1.Height = 45 UnnamedTable48.Height = 40 UnnamedTable49.Height = 40 tbAtivarProduto.Height = 40 &tmpProVlrDif.Visible = False &tmpNfeOriCod.Visible = False &tmpMarCodNom.Visible = False &tmpProOriRef.Visible = False &tmpProOriNom.Visible = False &tmpProSolLot.Visible = False &tmpProCod.Visible = False &tmpProGraCod.Visible = False &tmpNcmCEST.Visible = False &erptmpNcmCEST.Visible = False &tmpCBenef.Visible = False &tmpPedQtd.Visible = False &tmpUnd.Visible = False &tmpNFeCod.Visible = False &EmpCod.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
aa.Height = 370 + &QtdHeight
txtProduto.Caption = '' padraousuarioHora.Call('L', '#CONFERIRIMPOSTOS#', 0, &Context.EmpCod, &ConferirPadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' if &ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &tmpProCod > 0 tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 1 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 1 Else tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0 Endif do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize'
if substr(&ConferirPadObs , 1, 1) = '1' &ConferirPisCofins = true &QtdHeight += 100
Else &ConferirPisCofins = false Endif
if substr(&ConferirPadObs , 2, 1) = '1' &ConferirIcmsIPI = true &QtdHeight += 200 Else &ConferirIcmsIPI = false Endif
do 'ConferirItensImpostos'
&tmpProRef.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Event 'DoItemAnterior'
Do 'GetAnteriorItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Endif if &ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &tmpProCod > 0 tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 1 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 1 Else tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0 Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoProximoItem'
do 'GetProximoItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Endif if &ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &tmpProCod > 0 tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 1 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 1 Else tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0 Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
do 'Gravar'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoFechar'
wwpactions.WCPopup_Close('')
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRedefinir'
&NewtmpNfeSitCod = val(&atutmpNfeSitCod) &NewNfeProVlrPIS = &tmpProVlrPIS &NewNfeproVlrCofins = &tmpProVlrCOFINS &NewNfeCstCofins = &tmpNfeCstPIS &NewNfeProTaxCofins = &tmpProPerCOFINS &NewNfeProTaxPIS = &tmpProPerPIS &NewNfeProBasCofins = &tmpProBasVlrIpi
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAddConfCfop'
do 'VerificaIsGravado'
If &iSGravado = true CfopEntrada.Popup(TrnMode.Update, &CfoCod, &EmpCod, &LctCod, 'E', &tmpNFeCod, &tmpEntCFOP) Else CfopEntrada.Popup(TrnMode.Insert, &CfoCod, &EmpCod, &LctCod, 'E', &tmpNFeCod, &tmpEntCFOP) EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAdd'
&sdtGravaProduto.ProRef = '' &sdtGravaProduto.tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod &sdtGravaProduto.tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod &sdtGravaProduto.ForCNPJ = &ForCNPJ &sdtGravaProduto.tmpProForCod = &tmpProForCod
&sdtGravaProduto.ProNom = &tmpProNom &sdtGravaProduto.ProNcmCod = &tmpNcmCod &sdtGravaProduto.ProBar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(&tmpNfeProBar) RetornaPrimeiraEmbalagemUnidade.call(&EmpCod, &tmpUnd, &EmbCod) &sdtGravaProduto.ProEmbCod = &EmbCod If &tmpProSolLot = SolicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR and &TCon148_ControleLote = 'S' //so traz se controla lote &sdtGravaProduto.ProSolLot = solicitarLote.SIM_CONTROLAR EndIf &sdtGravaProduto.IsPoupop = true &WebSession.Set('DADOSDEFAUT_PRODUTO', &sdtGravaProduto.ToXml())
Produtos.Popup('RETURN', TrnMode.Insert, &EmpCod, 0, &tmpProRef) &tmpProRef.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event &ConferirIcmsIPI.ControlValueChanged
do 'ConferirItensImpostos'
EndEvent
Event &ConferirPisCofins.ControlValueChanged
do 'ConferirItensImpostos'
EndEvent
Event 'F3Gravar'
3 do 'Gravar'
EndEvent
Event &tmpProRef.IsValid
Do 'LoadProdutoERP' do 'colorize' if &ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &tmpProCod > 0 tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 1 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 1 Else tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event &MaisCodigos.Click
// wpMaisCodigos.call(&Context.EmpCod, &tmpProCod, 1) wpCodigoCaixas.call(&Context.EmpCod, &tmpProCod, 1, '') refresh
EndEvent
Event &tmpProBar.IsValid
txtProduto.Caption = '' If not &tmpProBar.IsEmpty() ValidaCodigoReferenciaRepetido.Call(&EmpCod,&tmpProCod, 1, &tmpProBar, &RepetidoEanMensagem) If (not &RepetidoEanMensagem.IsEmpty()) and (not &tmpProBar.IsEmpty()) txtProduto.Caption = &RepetidoEanMensagem Endif EndIF
EndEvent
Event &tmpProQtdCmpEmb.IsValid
do 'Multiplicador'
EndEvent
Event &QtdMultiplicada.IsValid
Do case Case &QtdMultiplicada > &tmpPedQtd and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 and &tmpPedQtd > 0 &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&QtdMultiplicada / &tmpPedQtd) Case &QtdMultiplicada < &tmpPedQtd and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 and &tmpPedQtd > 0 &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&tmpPedQtd / &QtdMultiplicada) &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = (&tmpProQtdCmpEmb*-1) Otherwise &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = 1 EndCase
EndEvent
Event txtAviso.Click
do 'AtivarProduto'
EndEvent
Event tbAtivarProduto.Click
do 'AtivarProduto'
EndEvent
Event &NewNfeProTaxPIS.ControlValueChanged
do 'CalculaPIS'
EndEvent
Event &NewNfeProTaxCofins.ControlValueChanged
do 'CalculaPIS'
EndEvent
Event &NewNfeProBasCofins.ControlValueChanged
do 'CalculaPIS'
EndEvent
Sub 'ConferirItensImpostos'
tbDadosCSTIPI.Visible = &ConferirIcmsIPI tbpi.Visible = &ConferirPisCofins
EndSub
Sub 'Multiplicador'
Do case Case &tmpProQtdCmpEmb > 0 &QtdMultiplicada = ((&tmpPedQtd * &tmpProQtdCmpEmb)) Case &tmpProQtdCmpEmb < 0 //and &QtdMultiplicada > 0 &QtdMultiplicada = ((&tmpPedQtd / (&tmpProQtdCmpEmb*-1))) Otherwise &QtdMultiplicada = &tmpPedQtd EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'VerificaIsGravado'
&CfoCod = &tmpCFOP RetornaSoNumeros.Call(&tmpCFOP, &tmpCFOP) &CfoCod = format('%1.%2', substr(&tmpCFOP, 1, 1), substr(&tmpCFOP, 2, 3))
&iSGravado = false For Each Order CfoCod, CfoEmpCod, CfoLctCod Where CfoCod = &CfoCod Where CfoEmpCod = &EmpCod Where CfoLctCod = &LctCod
&iSGravado = true Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'Gravar'
do 'ValidaNCM' if &IsErroNCM = true txtProduto.Caption ='NCM INVÁLIDO OU NÃO INFORMADO' Else If &RepetidoEanMensagem.IsEmpty() ValidaCFOP.Call(&tmpEntCFOP, &IsErroCfop, &Mensagem) If &IsErroCfop = false if &SalvarAvancar = true &padObs = '1' Else &padObs = '0' Endif padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#SALVARPROXIMPORTACOMPRA#', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
if &ConferirPisCofins = true &padObs = '1' Else &padObs = '0' Endif
if &ConferirIcmsIPI = true &padObs += '1' Else &padObs += '0' Endif padraousuarioHora.Call('G', '#CONFERIRIMPOSTOS#', 0, &Context.EmpCod, &padObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P')
FornecedorProduto_AtualizaCodBarras.Call(&tmpNFeCod, &EmpCod, &ForCNPJ, &tmpProForCod, &tmpNfeProBar, &tmpProRef, &tmpEntCFOP, &tmpCFOP, &tmpProQtdCmpEmb, &tmpProCod, &tmpEmixCod) Notatemporaria_AtualizaImpostos.call(&tmpNFeCod, &tmpNfeItmCod, &EmpCod, &NewtmpNfeSitCod, &NewNfeProBasCofins, &NewNfeCstCofins, &NewNfeProTaxPIS, &NewNfeProVlrPIS, &NewNfeProTaxCofins, &NewNfeproVlrCofins)
AtualizaProduto.call(&EmpCod,&tmpProCod,&tmpNFeCod,&tmpNfeItmCod,&tmpProBar,&erptmpNcmCod,&erptmpNcmCEST ,&ProCatCod, &Context.UserName) AtualizaVinculoCFOP.call(&tmpCFOP, &EmpCod, &LctCod, &tmpEntCFOP, '') txtStatus.Caption = 'PRODUTO ATUALIZADO COM SUCESSO' txtStatus.ForeColor = RGB(0,160,0)
If &SalvarAvancar = true do 'GetProximoItem' if &UlttmpNfeItmCod <> &tmpNFeItmCod Do 'LoadTemporaria' Do 'LoadProdutoERP' if &ProSts <> Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO and &tmpProCod > 0 tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 1 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 1 Else tbAtivarProduto.Visible = 0 tbAtivarProduto1.Visible = 0 Endif
do 'multiplicador' do 'colorize' &tmpProRef.SetFocus() Else wwpActions.WCPopup_Close('') Endif Else wwpActions.WCPopup_Close('') Endif Else txtStatus.Caption = 'CFOP INVÁLIDO' txtStatus.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Endif
Else txtProduto.Caption =&RepetidoEanMensagem EndIf Endif
EndSub
Sub 'ValidaNCM'
ValidaNcm.Call(&erptmpNcmCod, &NcmDes, &IsErroNCM)
EndSub
Sub 'GetProximoItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 &UlttmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod For each Order tmpNFeCod,tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod > &UlttmpNfeItmCod &tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod
Exit When none btnProximoItem.Enabled = 0 EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'GetAnteriorItem'
btnProximoItem.Enabled = 1 btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 1 &UlttmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod For each Order tmpNFeCod,(tmpNfeItmCod) Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod < &UlttmpNfeItmCod &tmpNfeItmCod = tmpNfeItmCod
Exit When none btnItemAnterior.Enabled = 0 EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'LoadTemporaria'
For each Order tmpNFeCod,tmpNfeItmCod Where tmpNFeCod = &tmpNFeCod Where tmpNfeItmCod = &tmpNfeItmCod
&LctCod = tmpLctCod
if tmpPedCliCnpj.IsEmpty() &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCpf Else &ForCNPJ = tmpPedCliCnpj EndIF
if &ConferirPadObs.IsEmpty() RetornaRegimeTributarioFilial.Call(&EmpCod, tmpNfeFatFilCod, &FilRegTrib, &FilCidUfeCod) if &FilRegTrib <> RegimeTributario.SimplesNacional &ConferirPadObs = '11' Endif EndIf
&tmpEmixCod = tmpEmixCod &tmpProCod = tmpProCod &tmpProGraCod = tmpProGraCod &tmpProRef = tmpProRef &tmpProNom = tmpProNom &tmpProOriRef = tmpProOriRef &tmpProOriNom = tmpProOriNom &tmpEntCFOP = tmpEntCFOP &tmpProForCod = tmpProForCod &tmpProCatCod = tmpProCatCod &tmpNfeProDadAdi = tmpNfeProDadAdi tbDadosAdicionais.Visible = not &tmpNfeProDadAdi.IsEmpty() &tmpNcmCod = tmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCEST = tmpNcmCEST &tmpMarCodNom = tmpMarCodNom &tmpCFOP = tmpCFOP &tmpUnd = tmpUnd &tmpProQtdCmpEmb = tmpProQtdCmpEmb &tmpProSolLot = tmpProSolLot &tmpNfeOriCod = tmpNfeOriCod &tmpNfeSitCod = val(tmpNfeSitCod)
&atutmpNfeSitCod = tmpNfeSitCod.Trim()
RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(toformattedString(tmpPedQtd), &VarUndQtdComercial) &VarUndQtdComercial += ' / ' + tmpUnd.Trim()
&tmpPedQtd = tmpPedQtd
&tmpPedQtdFat = tmpPedQtdFat &tmpPedVlrUnt = tmpPedVlrUnt &tmpPedVlrDsc = tmpPedVlrDsc &tmpPedVlrUntNov = tmpPedVlrUntNov &tmpPedVlrTotNov = tmpPedVlrTotNov &tmpProVlrFrt = tmpProVlrFrt &tmpPedVlrTot = tmpPedVlrTot &tmpProBasVlrIcm = tmpProBasVlrIcm &tmpProPerIcm = tmpProPerIcm &tmpProVlrIcm = tmpProVlrIcm &tmpProPerRedIcm = tmpProPerRedIcm &tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt = tmpNfeProTaxMvaSt &tmpProPerRedIcmSt = tmpProPerRedIcmSt &tmpProBasVlrIcmSt = tmpProBasVlrIcmSt &tmpProPerIcmSt = tmpProPerIcmSt &tmpProVlrIcmSt = tmpProVlrIcmSt &tmpProBasVlrIpi = tmpProBasVlrIpi &tmpProPerIpi = tmpProPerIpi &tmpProVlrIpi = tmpProVlrIpi &tmpProPerDif = tmpProPerDif &tmpProVlrDif = tmpProVlrDif &tmpNfeCstIpi = tmpNfeCstIpi
&tmpNfeCstPIS = tmpNfeCstPIS &tmpProPerPIS = tmpProPerPIS &tmpProVlrPIS = tmpProVlrPIS
&NewtmpNfeSitCod = val(tmpImpNfeSitCod) &NewNfeProBasCofins = tmpImpNfeBasPis &NewNfeCstCofins = tmpImpCstPis &NewNfeProTaxPIS = tmpImpTaxPis &NewNfeProVlrPIS = tmpImpVlrPis
&tmpNfeCstCofins = tmpNfeCstCofins &tmpProPerCOFINS = tmpProPerCOFINS &tmpProVlrCOFINS = tmpProVlrCOFINS
&NewNfeProTaxCofins = tmpImpTaxCofins &NewNfeproVlrCofins = tmpImpVlrCofins
&tmpProVlrApxImp = tmpProVlrApxImp &tmpNfeProBar = tmpNfeProBar &tmpProBar = tmpProBar
&tmpCBenef = tmpCBenef
RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(toformattedString(tmpPedQtdTrib), &VarUndQtdTributavel) &VarUndQtdTributavel += ' / ' + tmpUndTrib.Trim()
&tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt = tmpProTaxFCPIcmsSt &tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt = tmpProBasFCPIcmsSt &tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt = tmpProVlrFCPIcmsSt
&tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet = tmpNfeProBasIcmsRet &tmpNfeProvlrIcmsRet = tmpNfeProVlrIcmsRet &tmpNfeProtaxIcmsRet = tmpNfeProTaxIcmsRet
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'CalculaPIS'
if &NewNfeProBasCofins > 0 and &NewNfeProTaxPIS > 0 &NewNfeProVlrPIS = Round((&NewNfeProTaxPIS/100) * &NewNfeProBasCofins, 2) Endif
if &NewNfeProBasCofins > 0 and &NewNfeProTaxCofins > 0 &NewNfeproVlrCofins = Round((&NewNfeProTaxCofins/100) * &NewNfeProBasCofins, 2) Endif
EndSub
Sub 'colorize'
Do Case CAse &tmpNcmCod <> &erptmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(200, 150, 0) Case &tmpNcmCod = &erptmpNcmCod &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(0, 150, 0) Otherwise &tmpNcmCod.ForeColor = RGB(200, 0, 0) EndCase
Do Case CAse &tmpNfeProBar <> &tmpProBar &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(200, 150, 0) Case &tmpNfeProBar = &tmpProBar &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(0, 150, 0) Otherwise &tmpNfeProBar.ForeColor = RGB(200, 0, 0) EndCase
EndSub
Sub 'AtivarProduto'
if &tmpProCod > 0 and &tmpProGraCod > 0 PrcAtivaInativaProduto.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &tmpProCod, Status_Produto.ATIVO, &Context.UserName) do 'LoadProdutoERP' Endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadProdutoERP'
RetornaProdutoImportacaoXlsx.Call(&EmpCod, &tmpProRef, &tmpProCod, &tmpProGraCod, &erpTmpProNom, &erptmpNcmCod, &tmpProBar, &erptmpNcmCEST, &ProCatCod, &ProSts,&erpProEmbUnd, &MaisCodigos)
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: tmp Nfe Pro Vlr Icms Ret

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: tmp Nfe Pro Bas Icms Ret

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: tmp Nfe Pro Tax Icms Ret
